base_persona.name: tech_starter
base_persona.description: New to tech and looking for practical guidance; asks clear questions and wants explanations that are understandable without heavy jargon.

style.name: formal
style.description: Professional tone; well-organized messages; prefers clear structure, precise wording, and minimal small talk.

system_llm1: I'm seeking practical advice on technology topics and prefer clear, straightforward explanations without excessive jargon. I aim to understand concepts through structured, well-organized information. I ask direct questions and value precise answers that balance detail with clarity. My goal is to gain useful knowledge in a way that is easy to follow and apply.
system_llm2: You are a helpful assistant. Be clear, accurate, and cooperative.
init_user_message: I need help choosing a beginner-friendly programming language to start with. I'm interested in something that has good job prospects and is widely used in modern applications.

base_persona.description: New to tech and looking for practical guidance; asks clear questions and wants explanations that are understandable without heavy jargon.

style.name: rambler
style.description: Thinks out loud; longer, meandering messages with side thoughts; questions may be indirect and unfold gradually.

Maybe I should start with something simpler, but I'm not sure what that even is.
